headline: Lamb Weston's Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Sales Rise 3% Y/Y
summary: LW beats fiscal third-quarter earnings and sales estimates as volume gains offset pricing pressure, even as profit declined from last year.

raw.headline: Lamb Weston's Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Sales Rise 3% Y/Y

headline: Will Hershey's big recipe changes satisfy 'pickier' consumers?
summary: Hershey (HSY) announced a number of product changes at its investor day this week.In the video above, Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré, Winthrop Capital chief investment officer Adam Coons, and BCA Research chief global strategist and director of research Peter Berezin chat with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi about the company's announcements and stock performance, especially as US consumers continue to face economic pressure.

headline: Nike stock sinking on weak outlook. What should investors know?
summary: Nike (NKE) stock is sinking after reporting weak outlook, citing oil prices (CL=F, BZ=F) and Middle East disruptions.BCA Research chief global strategist Peter Berezin, Winthrop Capital CIO Adam Coons, and Yahoo Finance Senior Markets Reporter Ines Ferré speak with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi about the shoe giant's latest forecasts.

headline: Conagra Q3 Earnings Miss Estimates Despite Organic Sales Growth
summary: CAG's Q3 EPS lags as margins shrink, but organic sales rise on stronger frozen and snacks volumes amid inflation and divestiture headwinds.

headline: PRPL Q4 Loss Narrower Than Estimates, Sales Rise on Wholesale Strength
summary: Purple's Q4 loss narrows and sales rise 9.1% y/y as wholesale strength, cost cuts and Rejuvenate 2.0 momentum marked a turnaround in 2026.

headline: Hershey Investor Day: “ONE Hershey” Sales Model, Supply-Chain Tech Push and 2027 Margin Recovery Plan
